Made by Yparx1
Asteria Chart

Asteria Chart creates a personal birth chart using your birth place, date, and time, then explains it in clear and simple language.

What you’ll get Sun, Moon, Ascendant, planet positions, houses, major alignments, and easy-to-read guidance.
Why we ask for place Your city gives the timezone and coordinates automatically, which helps calculate houses and the Ascendant correctly.
Why time matters Birth time makes the chart more personal. It affects the Ascendant, houses, and other time-sensitive details.
For reflection and self-understanding — not fixed fate.
Step 1 of 2
Choose your birth place
City-based lookup: Asteria Chart fills in the timezone and coordinates automatically, so you only need to choose your city.
Choose a city from the suggestions for the best timezone and coordinate accuracy.
Step 2 of 2
Enter your birth date and time
Why time matters: even a small time difference can change the Ascendant and house placements, so enter the most accurate time you know.
Calibrating chart…
Please wait while Asteria Chart opens the next gate

Asteria Chart
—
Your Chart Overview
—
Solar View
A visual map of the planetary pattern at birth. Tap a planet to isolate its meaning. Spacing is widened for readability; the time-based angles remain unchanged.
Select a planet or house
The description will appear here.
Click any planet in the legend, click a planet in the solar view, or click a house card lower on the page.
Key notes
Compass Wheel View
A detailed wheel inspired by traditional natal chart layouts. It shows sign sectors, house divisions, planet degrees, and aspect lines. Exact aspect orbs are listed in Major alignments.
